Test Scenario / Metric View: Basic Request Submission: User submits email and detailed message via form.
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: System displays success message. User receives email confirmation. Draft Ticket created in system.

Test Scenario / Metric View: Google Login: User selects "Continue with Google" on login page.
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: User is registered/logged in automatically and redirected to ticket tracking view.

Test Scenario / Metric View: AI Draft Analysis: System processes a new complex user request.
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: AI automatically populates a relevant Title, Category, Summary, and Resolution Path.

Test Scenario / Metric View: AI Routing: System processes a request related to a specific topic (e.g., "Database").
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: AI suggests an Assignee with a matching scope (e.g., "IT Operations").

Test Scenario / Metric View: Mass Request Consolidation: 3 Users submit identical requests.
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: System recommends merging requests. Admin can merge them into one Draft Ticket with all users listed as Followers.

Test Scenario / Metric View: Draft Review & Activation: Admin edits AI fields, sets deadline, and clicks "Submit".
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: Ticket status changes from 'Draft' to 'New'. Ticket appears in the Assignee's active queue.

Test Scenario / Metric View: Status Progression: Assignee moves ticket through New → Assigned → Solving → Failed.
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: System records every status change in the History log with timestamps and user ID.

Test Scenario / Metric View: Internal vs. Public Comments: Assignee adds one internal and one public comment.
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: User sees only the public comment. Admin/Staff see both comments.

Test Scenario / Metric View: Global Dashboard View: Admin views the main reports page.
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard summarizes Total Ticket Volume, Resolution Times, and Current Backlogs.

Test Scenario / Metric View: Trend Analysis: Admin filters report by "Last 30 Days".
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard displays Top Categories and volume trends for that period.

Test Scenario / Metric View: Workload Dashboard: Assignee views their main landing page.
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: Default view shows tickets assigned to them (excluding Solved/Failed). List is sortable by Urgency/Deadline.

Test Scenario / Metric View: Personal Performance: Assignee views their personal stats.
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard displays personal metrics, such as Total Tickets Solved by this specific assignee.

Test Scenario / Metric View: Mobile Responsiveness: Access system via smartphone (360px width).
Expected Result / Acceptance Criteria: Interface is fully responsive; forms and reports are usable without horizontal scrolling.

Role: Admin Dashboard: Must provide a high-level overview of system health (Volume, Speed, Backlog) to help identify process bottlenecks
Assignee Dashboard: Must be action-oriented, prioritizing active work by deadline and showing personal contribution metrics.
